basic_details.job_title: RRI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Personal Secretary and Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Raman Research Institute (RRI) Personal Secretary and Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 04 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the RRI Personal Secretary and Assistant Recruitment 2026 for the posts of Personal Secretary and Assistant.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university, Minimum 3 years experience in secretarial work or administration/purchase/accounts
qualification.details: Personal Secretary: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university with a minimum of 3 years of experience in secretarial work in Central Govt. Office/State Govt. Office/Central Autonomous Body/Govt. of India Undertaking/University/Research Institute. Assistant: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university or equivalent with a minimum of 3 years of experience in a central government organization/PSU/Autonomous body in General Administration/Purchase/Accounts related matters.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 8 / Pay Level 4 as per 7th CPC
salary_details.details: Personal Secretary: Pay Level 8 (As per 7th CPC) Assistant: Pay Level 4 (As per 7th CPC)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RRI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RRI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.raman_research_institute_rri: Pay Level 8 / Pay Level 4 as per 7th CPC
Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university, Minimum 3 years experience in secretarial work or administration/purchase/accounts

content_sections.heading: RRI Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the RRI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download RRI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RRI Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Personal Secretary: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university with a minimum of 3 years of experience in secretarial work in Central Govt. Office/State Govt. Office/Central Autonomous Body/Govt. of India Undertaking/University/Research Institute. Assistant: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university or equivalent with a minimum of 3 years of experience in a central government organization/PSU/Autonomous body in General Administration/Purchase/Accounts related matters.

content_sections.heading: RRI Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Personal Secretary: Pay Level 8 (As per 7th CPC) Assistant: Pay Level 4 (As per 7th CPC)

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Online Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RRI Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RRI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RRI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application for the RRI Recruitment 2026 is 06 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the post names for which RRI is recruiting?
faq.answer: Raman Research Institute (RRI) is recruiting for the posts of Personal Secretary and Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in this RRI recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for the Personal Secretary and Assistant posts in the RRI Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Personal Secretary post?
faq.answer: For the Personal Secretary post, candidates must be a Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university with a minimum of 3 years of experience in secretarial work.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Assistant post?
faq.answer: The Assistant post is offered at Pay Level 4 as per the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates. The application fee is Nil for these categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for RRI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for RRI Recruitment 2026 is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the RRI Recruitment 2026 includes a Written Test, which will have both Objective and Descriptive papers.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for RRI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.

faq.question: Q10. What is the minimum experience required for the Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Assistant post, a minimum of 3 years of experience in General Administration/Purchase/Accounts related matters in a central government organization/PSU/Autonomous body is required.
